We may also collect and use your personal data for the purpose of sharing such Data with co-brand partner for marketing and promoting which the co-brand partner thinks may be of interest to you.

Your Personal Data held by us shall be kept confidential but we may from time to time in compliance with applicable laws on data privacy, disclose your personal data to any KBZ group of companies or to third parties whether located in Myanmar or elsewhere for the purpose of carrying out the purposes set out above.
